workflows.title: Workflows
workflows.subtitle: Design and manage your AI workflows
workflows.emptyHint: Create your first AI workflow to get started

deleteModal.title: Delete Workflow
deleteModal.message: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.

properties.title: Properties
properties.empty: Select a node to edit its properties.
properties.emptyHint: Click a node on the canvas to view its properties

fields.approvalDescriptionHint: Explain what the human is deciding on. Variables like {{agent.decision}} are resolved from context.
fields.proposalPayloadHint: Shown to the reviewer alongside the description. Supports {{mustache}} substitution.
fields.conversationIdHint: Expression resolved against the execution context. Default uses conversationId from the upstream Linktor trigger.
fields.targetUserHint: Leave blank to return the conversation to the queue and let Linktor routing rules pick an agent.
fields.expressionHint: Boolean expression evaluated against the context. Use ${path.to.value} to reference upstream outputs.
fields.switchExpressionHint: Value compared against each case label.
fields.switchCasesHint: The keyword `default` matches anything unmatched by the other cases.
fields.itemVariableHint: Each iteration binds the current element under this name in the context.
fields.failFast: Fail fast if any branch errors
fields.outputVariableHint: Context path where the merged result is written.
fields.transformHint: Dialect: JSONata-style (current impl uses a simple ${path} + arithmetic/boolean evaluator).
fields.promptChunkHint: Static block of prompt. Combined with sibling chunks via their order.
fields.promptTemplateHint: Mustache-style template. Variables resolve against the flow context.
fields.requiredVariablesHint: Flow will fail-fast if any listed variable is missing at render time.
fields.jsonSchemaHint: If provided, validates the payload at the flow boundary.
fields.rejectIfMissing: Reject execution if input is missing
fields.argumentsHint: Passed as the tool's arguments object. Supports {{mustache}} against the flow context.
fields.inputMappingHint: Forwarded as the nested flow's input. Supports {{mustache}} substitution from the parent context.
fields.fireAndForget: Fire and forget (do not wait for completion)

executions.title: Execution History
executions.emptyHint: Execute a workflow to see results here

triggers.title: Scheduled triggers
triggers.info: Triggers fire on the server's local time using Quartz cron expressions (6 or 7 fields: sec min hour day-of-month month day-of-week [year]). When a trigger fires it submits an InvocationRequest to the agent queue — the same path as the "Invoke" button in the playground.
triggers.name: Name
triggers.cronHint: Quartz format: sec min hour day-of-month month day-of-week [year]
triggers.invalidJsonMsg: Payload must be a valid JSON object

impersonation.viewingAs: Viewing as admin of {{name}}. All actions are recorded in the audit log.

metrics.noSamples: No samples in the selected window.

audit.filterActor: Filter by actor (user id or username)...

traces.search: Search by trace id, flow id, execution id...

traceDetail.title: Trace {{id}}
traceDetail.noSpans: No spans captured for this trace.

running.title: Running flows
running.emptyHint: The table will auto-refresh every 2 seconds
running.cancelPrompt: Are you sure you want to cancel

live.attachHint: Attach to a tenant/session to start streaming.

form.name: Tenant name
form.emailHint: Invitation will be sent to this email

toggleLabels.debugMode: Debug mode — full trace per node

workspace.title: Workspace Overview
workspace.summaryUnavailable: Workspace summary is unavailable right now.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.createdHint: Copy the key now — it won't be shown again
apiKeys.storeWarning: This key will not be shown again. Store it securely.

scopedKeys.title: Scoped API keys
scopedKeys.info: These keys belong to the scoped/expirable system (/api/apikeys) — distinct from the admin workspace dev keys. They carry explicit scopes.
scopedKeys.created: Key created — copy the secret now
scopedKeys.createdHint: This is the only time the secret will be shown.

history.title: Execution History
history.emptyHint: Run a workflow to see history here

agentPlayground.title: Agent Playground
agentPlayground.info: Trigger an agent directly (on-demand) or send a conversational message. Both require an AgentInvocationQueue wired on the backend.
agentPlayground.agentPlaceholder: Pick an agent from the catalog

voicePlayground.title: Voice playground
voicePlayground.subtitle: Talk to an ArchFlow agent in real time. Pick a persona, tap the mic and speak — your audio is streamed to the realtime adapter and the transcript appears below as the agent responds.
voicePlayground.personaHint: The agent role used for this session
voicePlayground.micHint: Audio is streamed as PCM16 24kHz frames over a WebSocket scoped to your tenant. Nothing is recorded server-side beyond the transcript.

brainSentry.title: BrainSentry
brainSentry.info: BrainSentry is a long-term agent memory system. When enabled, the BrainSentryInterceptor enriches tool-execution prompts with relevant memories and stores new episodes. The API key is stored server-side and never sent back to the browser in plain text.
brainSentry.apiKeyHint: Leave the masked placeholder to keep the existing key
brainSentry.deepAnalysis: Force deep LLM analysis on every interception
brainSentry.credsCard: Need credentials? Run BrainSentry locally: docker compose -f brain-sentry/docker-compose.dev.yml up

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.empty: No extensions match the current filter.
marketplace.uninstallHint: Remove this extension from the registry
marketplace.notInstalledHint: Extension has already been fetched; install via modal
marketplace.manifestHint: Path to manifest.json inside the configured extensions directory

templates.title: Templates
templates.subtitle: Start from a pre-built workflow and adapt it to your needs. Click any card to see the canvas preview, then clone it into your workspace.

servers.title: MCP Servers
servers.emptyTitle: No MCP servers are registered on this instance.
servers.emptyHint: Configure MCP servers in the backend Spring context (see McpInspectionControllerImpl) and they will show up here.

skills.title: Skills
skills.emptyHint: Set archflow.skills.directory in application properties and restart the backend to load skills from the filesystem.

config.title: Linktor
config.info: Linktor is an open-source omnichannel messaging platform (WhatsApp, Telegram, Instagram, SMS, Email, Webchat…). Once enabled, it shows up under MCP Servers and as a selectable server inside the workflow editor, giving agents direct access to ~51 Linktor tools (send message, list conversations, drive VRE visual responses, etc.).
config.baseUrlHint: Forwarded to the MCP server as LINKTOR_API_URL
config.apiKeyHint: LINKTOR_API_KEY. Leave masked placeholder to preserve.
config.mcpCommandHint: Path or command to the linktor-mcp binary. Space-separated args are supported.
config.saved: Configuration saved — it will be picked up on the next request.
config.installHint: npm install -g @linktor/mcp-server — the binary linktor-mcp is added to your PATH. Alternatively, run node /path/to/linktor-mcp-server/dist/index.js.

conversation.title: Conversation
conversation.assigneePlaceholder: Target user id (leave blank to return to queue)

chat.startWithWorkflow: Start a conversation with this workflow.
chat.sendFailed: Failed to send message. Please try again.
chat.submitFormFailed: Failed to submit form. Please try again.

approvals.title: Approval queue
approvals.subtitle: Pending human-in-the-loop decisions. Click a row to review the proposal and decide.
approvals.search: Search by request id, flow id, description...

detail.heading: Approval {{id}}
detail.invalidJson: Edited payload is not valid JSON

subflow.label: Subflow
subflow.description: Invoke another workflow as a step

mcp-tool.description: Call a tool on a registered MCP server

linktor-send.description: Post a message to a Linktor conversation

linktor-escalate.label: Linktor escalate
linktor-escalate.description: Hand a conversation off to a human agent
